Video.summary: Our cameras were at home with sisters Olivia and Catherine when Olivia confronted her older sister for sleeping with her boyfriend, Jacob. Next Jeromy has been having an affair with 2 sisters and both are now pregnant!
Video.title: Sisters Pregnant by the Same Man

Image.alt: Sisters Pregnant by the Same Man
Sisters Pregnant by the Same Man
Sisters Pregnant by the Same Man

Video.summary: Anthoney wants to be a father to his child, but he wants nothing to do with the one-night-stand mother; Deja had sex with her friend's boyfriend and now wants him for herself; Derrick and Haven have confessions to make.
Video.title: Dodging Divorce

Video.summary: Convict love stories! It's Jerry's jailbird special and he's got two sexy prisoners of love and one mini feisty officer to help keep the inmates in order.
Video.title: Back Off My Jailbird Lover!

Video.summary: Tempers flare when Belinda's husband finds out she's cheating, but he thinks it's his fault and asks for forgiveness. Next Twist will reveal a huge secret to his fiancee ... he is really a woman!
Video.title: Unforgivable Secrets!

Video.summary: They say that money makes the world go round. These guests say that they make money by laying on their backs!
Video.title: Prostitutes Tell All

Video.summary: Kitty came to the show to pose nude for our audience and a camera man while "fooling around" with her friend, Naomi! Next Gee is here to finally get even with her sister, Jenny, for sleeping with her man.
Video.title: Naughty Girls

Video.summary: Clint wants his wife's girlfriend, Anna, to back off! Next Kelly's husband pleads with her to take him back. But Kelly's mind is made up, she's staying with her husband's brother!
Video.title: Ex-lovers Return!

Video.summary: Richie will tell Shelly he has been sleeping with DeeDee, a transsexual and Lesley, a transgender female. Then Gina will confess to her boyfriend, Rob, that she is sleeping with his best friend, Joe!
Video.title: Naughty Lovers Confronted

Video.summary: CeCe is here to tell her girlfriend, Michelle, that she is cheating with PJ who's a man! Next Silas is here to tell his girlfriend that he's been cheating with her best friend! Then Mark recently caught his fiance, Liz, in bed with her lover, Angie!
Video.title: Hot Sex Secrets!

Video.summary: Pamela is here today to tell her best friend, Terri, that she is sleeping with her son, Brandon. Next Deaire has been sleeping with Brenda’s 62-year-old mother! Then Brandi will tell her fiancé that she's been having an affair with twin brothers!
Video.title: Wild Affairs!

Video.summary: Nikki, Courtney, and Samantha all want to have a three-way lesbian marriage! Then Jonathan's engaged to two different women, but after they learn they're both being playing, he's going to have to make a choice.
Video.title: Brawlin' Brides!

Video.summary: Darryl has been cheating on his girlfriend Nicole with her hair dresser Nickell. He says he was just getting bored of the same old thing. Then Cheree is here because her girlfriend Chocolate is having a hard time coming out lo her family.
Video.title: Break-ups and Beatdowns

Video.summary: Missy and Kevin dated online, but he moved on to Whitney. Missy won’t stop chasing him! Rebecca won’t let Tony get away with cheating on her. His friends say she’s lying! Stacy’s best friend Amanda crashed with her and slept with her man Bryan!
Video.title: You Can't Run From Me!

Video.summary: Three women fight over the same man; a woman must choose between marrying her fiancé or her cousin.
Video.title: Springer Weddings

Video.summary: Diamynn admits to hooking up with a man who has a girlfriend and a child; Angel regrets kissing Brittany and does not want to rekindle a relationship with her; Kaitlyn says her husband's floundering wrestling career is hard on their family.
Video.title: Baby, I'm Weak

Video.summary: Brittany's twin seems ready, willing and able to pick up her slack; Junior offers his wife a symbolic gesture of his love and commitment, but she has moved on; Becca is crazy about her boyfriend.
Video.title: I Had Sex With My Baby Mama's Twin

Image.alt: I Had Sex With My Baby Mama's Twin
I Had Sex With My Baby Mama's Twin
I Had Sex With My Baby Mama's Twin

Video.summary: Paige admits to sleeping with her friend's boyfriend; Alex confesses to cheating with two women; Kaylynn decides to get even with her friend.
Video.title: I Slept With 120 Men ... and Yours

Image.alt: I Slept With 120 Men ... and Yours
I Slept With 120 Men ... and Yours
I Slept With 120 Men ... and Yours

Video.summary: Audrina is prepared to get to the bottom of rumors that her boyfriend slept with her strip-club co-worker; Ashley's husband wants her permission to have sex with other women; Stephanie's revelation may ruin her bond with her newfound sister.
Video.title: Stripper Slapfest

Video.summary: James tells his fiancee that he's cheating with Melanie. Jewel and Christa compete for Mistress Shock's love!
Video.title: I Have Another Lover

Video.summary: Kierra's friend Adrianna says Darrius is no good; Brittany wants a monogamous relationship with Mark; Samantha hopes Drew accepts her proposition to move in together.
Video.title: Harsh Heartbreakers

Video.summary: Chrishon denies he's engaged to Taiwana weeks before they wed. Lauren confronts her ex for leaving her!
Video.title: I Never Let You Go

Video.summary: Dallas confesses his affair with his fiance's maid of honor. Rickey and Beverly fight for the same woman.
Video.title: Scandalous Affairs

Video.summary: Allen’s wife Latasha moved in her boyfriend Boo. Will Latasha cave in or will she leave Allen for Boo?
Video.title: My Wife Moved Her Boyfriend In

Image.alt: My Wife Moved Her Boyfriend In
My Wife Moved Her Boyfriend In
My Wife Moved Her Boyfriend In

Video.summary: Jamie is here to tell his ex-lover that he actually left her for a cross-dressing guy!
Video.title: Baby I'm Dumping You

Video.summary: Beth and Eric have been dating for one year. But Eric began sleeping with Beth's sister with Beth's permission
Video.title: I Share My Lover!

Video.summary: Solo has a few things he needs to tell his best friend and girlfriend, Vixen.
Video.title: My Boyfriend Is A Woman!

Video.summary: Tony confesses to his girlfriend that he is cheating on her with a transsexual. Mary confronts her transsexual roommate Shortee. Next, Limont confronts his one-night stand.
Video.title: Tales of the She-Males

Video.summary: These guests say they are willing to betray family and friends in their quest to find a lover.
Video.title: Angry Lovers Attack!!

Video.summary: Arvonda says her fiance can't satisfy her and treats her badly. She'll tell him that she's been sleeping with his best friend, Mike! Next When Teresa's boyfriend asked her to have a threesome, she had no idea he was having an ongoing affair!
Video.title: Leave It To Springer!

Video.summary: Jamie has been stripping and cheating on her boyfriend with a woman! Then, Steve believes his wife’s been cheating with another man. Next LaToya's here to cause a family feud. She's been cheating with her girlfriend's sister!
Video.title: Hidden Affairs!

Video.summary: Tony is sleeping with his girlfriends best friend, Allen. Next Tammy’s fiancée, Ron, has no idea that she's been sleeping with her best friend, Autumn. Later Jan’s lovers, Russ and Ian, find out that Jan has yet another romantic interest in her life.
Video.title: I'm Having A Bi-Sexual Affair

Video.summary: Kenny lived with sisters Lora and Misty, who are also his lovers but he treats them like servants. Later, Jerry confronts Kenny with the results of the 9 positive paternity tests, but Kenny says he only cares about 2 of his 9 children.
Video.title: Three Sisters Share A Man!
